title: thelypteris subpectinata
intro: Thelypteris subpectinata, also known as the lance-leaved fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris subpectinata include reducing fever, soothing respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of various infections. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, and it can also be dried and used in tinctures or capsules.
